title: Meta-analyses of fifteen determinants of public opinion about climate change taxes and laws
authors: Magnus Bergquist; Andreas Nilsson; Niklas Harring; Sverker C. Jagers

tax_mentions.context: Example of climate-change taxes/laws studied for determinants of public opinion.
Scope: include taxes and laws such as carbon taxes (excluding broader non-tax climate policies).
tax_mentions.notes: Meta-analyzes determinants of acceptance/support for these tax instruments.

inclusion_reason: Meta-analysis of determinants of public opinion toward climate change taxes and laws, explicitly including carbon taxes and fuel taxation, and directly estimating correlations with public acceptability/support.
